scripts.prepare:data: mkdir -p public/data && cd .. && python3 scripts/research_workflow_doctor.py --write-data --json-out dashboard-web/public/data/dashboard-data.json --warn-only && python3 scripts/export_evidence_graph.py --out dashboard-web/public/data/evidence-graph.json --mermaid dashboard-web/public/data/evidence-graph.mmd
